title: LPG Fractionators (Gas Processing Units) in India
description: Gas Processing Units (GPUs) and fractionation facilities in India that extract LPG and other liquid hydrocarbons from natural gas streams. Operated primarily by GAIL and ONGC. These are distinct from oil refineries — they process natural gas rather than crude oil.
source: GAIL (India) Limited, ONGC, Petroleum Planning & Analysis Cell (PPAC)

fractionators.name: GAIL GPU Vijaipur Unit-1
fractionators.notes: GAIL's first GPU, commissioned 1991. Part of the Hazira-Vijaipur-Jagdishpur (HVJ) pipeline system.

fractionators.name: GAIL GPU Vijaipur Unit-2
fractionators.notes: Second GPU at Vijaipur, expanded capacity. Together with Unit-1 forms the main Vijaipur complex.

fractionators.name: GAIL GPU Pata
fractionators.notes: Integrated GPU and petrochemical complex commissioned 1999-2000. ~380 km from Delhi on Delhi-Kanpur rail line.

fractionators.name: GAIL GPU Gandhar
fractionators.feed: Natural gas from South Gujarat fields
fractionators.notes: Commissioned March 2001. Has dedicated 1 km LPG pipeline to nearby OMC bottling plant.

fractionators.name: GAIL GPU Vaghodia
fractionators.feed: Natural gas from Gujarat fields / pipeline
fractionators.notes: Fifth and newest GAIL GPU. Part of GAIL's total 1425 KTA LPG & LHC production capacity.

fractionators.name: ONGC Hazira Gas Processing Complex
fractionators.feed: Natural gas from Mumbai High, South Basin offshore fields
fractionators.notes: Major onshore processing terminal for ONGC offshore gas. Processes gas from Bombay High, Bassein and satellite fields.

fractionators.name: ONGC Uran Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Natural gas from Mumbai High offshore
fractionators.notes: Processes natural gas and condensate from Mumbai High and adjacent offshore fields. Major LPG fractionation point.

fractionators.name: ONGC Ankleshwar Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Onshore associated gas from Ankleshwar oil fields
fractionators.notes: Processes associated gas from one of India's oldest onshore producing fields.

fractionators.name: ONGC Mehsana Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Onshore associated gas from North Gujarat fields
fractionators.notes: Processes gas from North Gujarat fields including Sobhasan, Linch and other formations.

fractionators.name: ONGC Lakwa Field Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Associated gas from Assam-Arakan basin onshore fields
fractionators.notes: One of the earliest onshore gas processing plants in Northeast India.

fractionators.name: ONGC Sibsagar / Nazira Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Associated gas from Assam onshore fields
fractionators.notes: Processes gas from Assam Arakan fold belt producing fields.

fractionators.name: ONGC Geleki Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Associated gas from Geleki oil field
fractionators.notes: Associated with ONGC Geleki oilfield operations in upper Assam basin.

fractionators.name: ONGC Duliajan Field Gas Processing
fractionators.feed: Associated gas from upper Assam fields
fractionators.notes: Oil India Limited's main gas processing facility in upper Assam.

fractionators.name: BCPL Gas Cracker Unit (GPU), Lepetkata
fractionators.feed: Natural gas from OIL and ONGC Assam fields
fractionators.notes: GAIL JV with 70% equity. Integrated cracker and polymer complex in Northeast India.

fractionators.name: ONGC Rajahmundry Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.feed: Associated gas from KG Basin onshore fields
fractionators.notes: Processes gas from Krishna-Godavari (KG) onshore basin fields.

fractionators.name: ONGC Kalol Gas Processing Plant
fractionators.notes: Processes gas associated with Cambay Basin onshore crude oil production.

fractionators.name: GSPC / GSPC LNG Gas Processing, Hazira
fractionators.notes: GSPC gas processing associated with its LNG terminal at Hazira.

fractionators.name: ONGC / Reliance KG-D6 Onshore Terminal, Gadimoga
fractionators.notes: Onshore terminal for KG Basin deepwater gas. Includes fractionation of condensate to produce LPG.
